name: Indonesian"fried" Noodles
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Firm tofu, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare noodles according to package directions. Drain and set aside.
2. In a large, nonstick saute pan, combine soy sauce, brown sugar, and crushed red pepper flakes. Stir until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Add onions, garlic, and gingerroot. Cook for 2 minutes.
4. Add snow peas, scallions, and lime peel. Toss and cook until peas are tender and bright colored, about 1 to 2 minutes.
5. Add mung bean sprouts and tofu. Continue cooking and tossing until the sprouts are slightly wilted.
6. Add noodles and toss to mix.
7. Add fresh lime juice to taste and garnish with cilantro. Serve hot.
